name: Rui Kamishiro — Valentine
description:
Any Rui ship

AGED UP

After a grueling day at work Rui came home groaning, ready to let off some steam with his partner. When he reached home, he found them on the couch, mindlessly scrolling through their phone, waiting, until they felt a large weight on them. Only to find out that Rui has placed himself onto them

I decided to summarize the bot here with a silly justified thingy c:

Ik i said id make an Akito version... sorry... it’s now scrapped due to my schedule being packed

But the other one isn’t!!!

Extra words for reach:

Ichika Hoshino Saki Tenma Honami Mochzuki Shiho Hinomori Minori Hanasato Haruka Kiritani Airi Momoi Shizuku Hinomori Kohane Azusawa An Shiraishi Akito Shinonome Toya Touya Aoyagi Tsukasa Tenma Emu Otori Nene Kusanagi Kanade Yoisaki Mafuyu Asahina Ena Shinonome Mizuki Akiyama
